title: Implement pure redeemCoupon logic (percent/fixed, clamping, expiry)
acceptance_criteria: Percent and fixed coupons compute the correct discounted total in integer cents.
A discount larger than the subtotal clamps the total to 0 (never negative).
Expiry is inclusive at expiresAt; expired coupons are rejected.
Malformed codes, out-of-range percent values, and unknown kinds are rejected.
Invalid input returns { ok:false, reason } and never throws.

result.marker: [SKILL-CONFIRMATION: backend-coder | Implemented Files: src/coupon.mjs | Patterns: pure-function, integer-cents, result-type-over-exceptions | Artifact: backend-impl v1]
